ddls:
CREATE TABLE "server_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "property" TEXT /* Name of the RemoteIpValve property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property's function */,
  "equivalent_directive" TEXT /* Equivalent Apache mod_remoteip directive */,
  "format" TEXT /* Expected format for the property value */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the property if not explicitly set */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag to enable or disable the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proxy_settings" (
  "proxy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proxy setting */,
  "proxy_type" TEXT /* Type of proxy (e.g., internal, trusted) */,
  "regex_pattern" TEXT /* Regular expression pattern for matching proxy IP addresses */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the proxy setting */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the proxy is trusted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the proxy setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the proxy setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "header_definitions" (
  "header_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each header definition */,
  "header_name" TEXT /* Name of the http header */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the header */,
  "format" TEXT /* Expected format for the header value */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol supported by the header */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to enable or disable the header */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the header definition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the header definition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("header_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proxy_header_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "proxy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the proxy settings table */,
  "header_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the header definitions table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proxy_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "proxy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the proxy settings table */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* Client IP address */,
  "headers" TEXT /* Headers received from the client */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the proxy interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the server configurations table */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the documentation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the documentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)
